items.question: What is the difference between PEMF therapy and Terahertz frequency therapy?
items.answer: PEMF (Pulsed Electromagnetic Field) therapy uses low-frequency electromagnetic pulses that mimic the Earth's natural field to recharge cellular voltage — it's essentially a battery charger for your cells. Terahertz frequency operates on a higher band that resonates with the natural vibrations of healthy human cells, penetrating deep into tissues to activate stem cells and unblock meridians. They work through different mechanisms and powerfully complement each other.

items.question: Which product should I start with?
items.answer: That depends on your primary goal. For systemic cellular recovery and improved sleep, start with the TERA-P90 foot mat — it's the most convenient entry point. For localized pain or inflammation, the VITALITY WAND is the most direct tool. If you want the most comprehensive system combining PEMF and Terahertz in one, the flagship model is the THz TERA-P90+.

items.question: How soon will I see results?
items.answer: Most people notice changes in sleep quality within the first 3-7 days of consistent use — deeper sleep, waking up with more energy. Energy levels and pain typically shift noticeably within 2-3 weeks. The effects are cumulative; your body rebuilds cellular voltage and clears accumulated stress. The longer and more consistently you use the technology, the more pronounced the effects.

items.question: Can I use multiple devices at the same time?
items.answer: Yes — and we actively encourage it. For example: start your morning with 20 minutes on the TERA-P90 mat to charge your cellular voltage for the day, use the VITALITY WAND on symptomatic areas post-workout, hydrate with water from the H+ BAR throughout the day to manage oxidative stress, and wind down with the GALAXY G-ONE before bed to support nervous system recovery.

items.question: Is frequency therapy safe for people with existing medical conditions?
items.answer: Our devices use non-ionizing frequencies that are safe for the vast majority of people. Terahertz and PEMF are non-invasive and work with the body's natural frequencies. As with any wellness technology, individuals with pacemakers, implanted electronic devices, or pregnant women should consult their doctor before use.

items.question: What sets wellneXfreQ apart from other wellness brands?
items.answer: wellneXfreQ exists at the intersection of elite sports coaching and the science of quantum wellness. Every product is selected by a strength and movement coach with over 13 years of biohacking experience — not a marketing team. We don't just sell devices for the sake of selling. We educate on the science, provide a direct inquiry model, and build lasting relationships with clients to ensure results.

story.title: Unlocking the mind.
story.p1: I am a health, wellness, and movement coach with over 13 years of experience helping people biohack their health, break free from their own mental limitations, regain agency, and rebuild from the ground up.
story.p2: This means working through poor dietary habits, a lack of self-discipline, and a disconnect between the mind and body by building strong, resilient bodies and learning the art of movement.
story.p3: However, after my own struggles with chronic pain, burnout, and persistently low energy levels, I realized that most approaches to health are missing something fundamental.
story.p4: They work around the body, instead of working with it. Discovering the dual frequency technology of PEMF and Terahertz opened up a perspective I couldn't ignore, and which I now share with anyone seeking a deeper path to well-being.
story.quote: My pursuit of health, wellness, and longevity took me to a place most people haven't looked yet, and that is exactly why wellneXfreQ exists.

tech.title: Dual Action

One charges cellular voltage, the other restores the natural cellular rhythm. Together, they create a compounding effect that optimizes biological systems for vitality, recovery, and long-term performance.
tech.pemf_desc: Originally developed by NASA to support astronaut health, PEMF uses safe low frequency magnetic pulses to work with the body at a cellular level, like charging a battery. It promotes cellular repair, supports circulation, improves blood flow and supports pain relief.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: wellneXfreQ ("we", "us" or "our") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or submit an inquiry through our contact form.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: When you submit an inquiry through our contact form, we collect the following information: full name, email address, phone number (if provided), the product or service you are interested in, the content of your message, and how you heard about us. We may also collect basic analytical data, such as pages visited and time spent on the site, using standard analytical tools. We do not collect payment information – all purchases are handled via direct inquiry and not through an online cart.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: The information you provide is used solely to respond to your inquiry, provide product information, and follow up regarding your interest in our wellness technology. We do not use your data for automated marketing campaigns without your consent. If you have expressed interest in receiving educational content or updates from wellneXfreQ, we may occasionally send emails about new products, blog articles, or relevant wellness information. You can unsubscribe at any time.

sections.title: Sharing Your Information
sections.body: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share necessary information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website or business – such as email service providers – provided those parties agree to keep your information confidential. We may disclose information when required by law or to protect the rights, property, or safety of wellneXfreQ, our customers, or others.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy or as required by applicable law. Inquiry data is kept for up to 3 years to support ongoing client relationships and service history. You may request the deletion of your data at any time by contacting us directly at your@wellnexfreq.com.

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking
sections.body: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function properly. Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our content – this data is aggregated and anonymous. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may affect the functionality of certain parts of the site.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may have rights under applicable data protection laws, including: the right to access your personal data, the right to correct inaccurate information, the right to request deletion of your data, the right to withdraw consent for communication at any time, and the right to lodge a complaint with a relevant supervisory authority. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at your@wellnexfreq.com.

sections.title: Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. While we take the security of your data seriously, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We encourage you to use caution when sharing personal information online.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.body: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, including social media platforms and external resources. This Privacy Policy applies only to information collected on the wellneXfreQ site. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of external sites and encourage you to review their privacy policies independently.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. In the event of material changes, we will update the effective date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review the policy periodically. Your continued use of our website after any changes are made constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal information, please contact us at: your@wellnexfreq.com. We strive to respond to all privacy inquiries within 10 business days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to wellneXfreQ. By accessing our website and using our services, you agree to comply with the following terms. Please read these terms carefully before using our site.

sections.title: Scope of Services
sections.body: wellneXfreQ provides access to advanced frequency wellness technology and related educational content. Our products are sold through a direct inquiry and coaching model to ensure proper application and education. We do not provide medical advice or administer treatments.

sections.title: No Medical Advice
sections.body: The content on this site and the products offered are for educational and wellness purposes only. They are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay in seeking it because of something you have read on this site.

sections.title: Product Availability
sections.body: While we strive to maintain accurate product descriptions and availability, we reserve the right to limit quantities or discontinue products at any time without notice. Product specifications are subject to change based on technological advancements.

sections.title: Pricing and Payments
sections.body: Prices for our professional devices are provided upon inquiry. We reserve the right to change prices at any time. All transactions are handled directly through our secure invoicing process, not via a public cart.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this site, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of wellneXfreQ or its content suppliers and is protected by international copyright and intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use of any materials is strictly prohibited.

sections.title: User Conduct
sections.body: By using our site, you agree to use it only for lawful purposes and not to engage in any activity that could damage, disable, or impair the site's functionality or interfere with other users' access.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: wellneXfreQ, its officers, directors, and employees shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from or in connection with the use of our website or products.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.body: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which wellneXfreQ operates, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

sections.title: Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to immediately terminate or suspend access to our site and services, without prior notice, for any reason, including without limitation your breach of the Terms of Service.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at your@wellnexfreq.com.
